case_title: VO, PAUL VS FRANK,CASSANDRA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY VO, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK,CASSANDRA LEZIANK, ARTHUR SEBASTIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,133.63 FILED BY FRANK,CASSANDRA LEZIANK, ARTHUR SEBASTIAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT VO, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF VO, PAUL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VO, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANK,CASSANDRA LEZIANK, ARTHUR SEBASTIAN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FRANK,CASSANDRA LEZIANK, ARTHUR SEBASTIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT VO, PAUL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGE MCDONALD WAS NOTIFIED BY ALEX SAUSA RE DECISION OF DEFENDANT'S CLAIM.
